# STEADYWRK
> Jordan's AI-native career platform. Where ambition compounds.

## Company
- Name: STEADYWRK LLC
- Domain: steadywrk.app
- Location: Building 15, King Hussein Business Park, King Abdullah II Street, Amman, Jordan
- Founded: 2026
- Industry: AI-native talent platform, US commercial operations, BPO, digital marketing, facility management

## What We Do
STEADYWRK connects ambitious Jordanian talent — especially women 18-30 — with US commercial operations. We train operators with real AI tools, deploy them on real client work, and build careers that compound. Four verticals: AI Lab & Studio, Facility Management, Digital Marketing, AI BPO.

## Programs
- IGNITE (3-month internship): Ship production work from week one. Real projects, real deadlines, real mentorship.
- ORBIT (6-month fellowship): Lead projects. Mentor juniors. Build the systems that power operations.
- APEX (12-month leadership track): Architect solutions. Drive teams. Shape company direction.

## Open Positions
- Operations Dispatcher (Operations, Full-time, Amman) — Coordinate US commercial service operations. Cold-call, negotiate, manage workflows. Strong English and persuasion skills required. 400-700 JOD/month.
- AI Engineer (AI Lab, Full-time, Amman/Remote) — Design AI agent systems, LLM integrations, autonomous workflows. 800-1,500 JOD/month.
- Frontend Developer (Engineering, Full-time, Amman/Remote) — Build performant web interfaces with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript. 700-1,200 JOD/month.
- Digital Marketing Lead (Growth, Full-time, Amman) — SEO, content strategy, paid media, GEO optimization. 600-1,000 JOD/month.
- AI BPO Agent (BPO, Full-time, Amman) — AI-enhanced customer support and document processing. Training provided. 350-500 JOD/month.

Apply at https://steadywrk.app/apply or email hello@steadywrk.app. 6–8 minute application. We respond within 48 hours.

## Technology
Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Clerk Auth, Neon Postgres, Drizzle ORM, Resend, PostHog, Cal.com, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Facts
- Jordan produces ~7,000 technology graduates annually
- 46% youth unemployment (15-24), 66% for young women
- Jordan ranks 3rd in Arab world for AI adoption in public sector
- 92.5% internet penetration, primarily mobile
- KHBP is at 100% occupancy with Phase Two expansion underway (266,000 sqm)
- Jordan's ICT sector: 46,000+ employees, targeting 100,000 by 2033

## Hiring Process
7-stage funnel: Application (6-8 min) → AI Screening → Skills Assessment → Async Video → Live Interview (45 min) → Team Meet (30 min) → Offer. Total: ≤14 days. Response within 48 hours. Constructive feedback for Stage 3+ rejections.

- Email: hello@steadywrk.app
